title: You are an Architect. Perform a gap analysis of the 'まさおノート' video generation pipeline. ## PIPELINE OVERVIEW (as implemented) generate-video.ts executes this flow: 1. PlannerOrchestrator.execute(topic) → Scenario, Dialogue, Direction 2. compose({scenario, dialogue, direction}) → EnhancedVideoScript...
summary_text: { "gaps": [ { "id": "G1", "severity": "CRITICAL", "component": "scripts/generate-video.ts + src/services/image/orchestrator.ts", "description": "The runtime pipeline never calls ImageOrchestrator, so no scene images are generated and `imageFile` stays unset for all scenes.", "fix_summary": "Add an image-generation stage after planning/composition. Generate per-scene assets, publish them to `public/`, and inject `imageFile` into the final `EnhancedVideoScript`." }, { "id": "G2", "severity": "MAJOR", "component": "src/services/compose/compose.ts", "description": "Visual direction fields (`image`, `background`, `accent`, `highlight`) are mostly dropped during compose; only transition/section are indirectly used, so direction quality does not reach rendering.", "fix_summary": "Map direction metadata into scene fields (`imagePrompt` and visual props). Extend scene schema/types where needed so direction survives to Remotion." }, { "id": "G3", "severity": "MAJOR", "component": "src/services/planner/orchestrator.ts + src/schemas/direction.schema.ts", "description": "Direction `image` is optional and fallbackDirection never sets it, so non-LLM/fallback runs are guaranteed to produce zero image prompts.", "fix_summary": "Require/strongly enforce one image prompt per scene in direction generation and fallback templates. Validate direction scene count + image prompt coverage before compose." }, { "id": "G4", "severity": "MAJOR", "component": "src/services/tts/* (client.ts, synthesize-all.ts)", "description": "No TTS text normalization layer exists for English/technical tokens (e.g., `TypeScript`), causing unreadable or poor pronunciation in Japanese TTS engines.", "fix_summary": "Add a preprocessing pass (roman token detection, katakana transliteration, custom pronunciation dictionary). Apply it before both VOICEVOX and COEIROINK synthesis." }, { "id": "G5", "severity": "CRITICAL", "component": "src/services/tts/client.ts (COEIROINKClient)", "description": "COEIROINK synthesis ignores `request.speaker`; it always sends constructor-default `speakerUuid/styleId` (default つくよみちゃん), so speaker selection is functionally broken.", "fix_summary": "Resolve speaker per request and send matching `speakerUuid/styleId` to `/v1/predict`. Remove hardwired default behavior for runs that specify `--speaker`." }, { "id": "G6", "severity": "MAJOR", "component": "scripts/generate-video.ts + src/services/tts/client.ts", "description": "Speaker IDs are VOICEVOX-style numeric IDs, but fallback to COEIROINK has no compatibility mapping/capability check, so invalid requests silently degrade to wrong voice.", "fix_summary": "Introduce a provider-agnostic speaker registry with per-provider mappings. If active provider cannot satisfy requested speaker, fail fast or explicitly remap with warning." }, { "id": "G7", "severity": "MAJOR", "component": "src/services/compose/compose.ts + src/services/tts/synthesize-all.ts + src/EnhancedVideoComposition.tsx", "description": "Per-scene `dialogueScene.speaker` is discarded; a single global `--speaker` drives all audio and character rendering, preventing multi-speaker scripts and causing voice/character mismatch risk.", "fix_summary": "Carry speaker identity into each `EnhancedScene`, synthesize scene-by-scene with that speaker, and pass per-scene speaker info to `CharacterLayer`." }, { "id": "G8", "severity": "MINOR", "component": "src/EnhancedVideoComposition.tsx", "description": "Template selection logic exists but is bypassed by a fixed template (`01_NeonPop`) for all scenes, reducing intended visual diversity.", "fix_summary": "Use scene-type template routing/round-robin at runtime and keep fixed template as an explicit override mode." }, { "id": "G9", "severity": "MINOR", "component": "src/services/compose/compose.ts + src/schemas/enhanced-video-script.schema.ts", "description": "Schema includes scene types (`chapter`, `code-walkthrough`) that compose never emits, leaving dead paths and reducing type-system fidelity.",...
